subcodes.first_line: These are the verses of holiness which have been sent down in truth from Our presence unto all the peoples of the world, that they may follow the paths of their Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تلک آیات القدس نزلت بالحق من لدنا علی العالمین جمیعا لیتبعوا الناس سبل ربهم
subcodes.subjects: @false claims to divine revelation or spiritual stations, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement
